entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species studied for micronutrient density in the grain.

entities.name: IRON DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the grain of pearl millet.

entities.name: ZINC DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grain of pearl millet.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential trace elements, specifically iron and zinc, targeted for biofortification.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in the genetic makeup of pearl millet entries regarding micronutrient content.

entities.name: INHERITANCE
entities.description: The process by which micronutrient traits are passed from parents to offspring.

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENETIC VARIANCES
entities.description: The portion of genetic variance due to the additive effects of alleles.

entities.name: MATERNAL EFFECT
entities.description: The influence of the female parent's genotype or cytoplasm on the offspring's phenotype.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC EFFECT
entities.description: The influence of genes located in the cytoplasm on the inheritance of traits.

entities.name: INBRED
entities.description: Pure-breeding lines used as parents in the breeding study.

entities.name: HYBRID
entities.description: Offspring resulting from the cross of two different parents.

entities.name: OPV
entities.description: Open-pollinated varieties used as breeding material.

entities.name: DIRECT CROSS
entities.description: A specific pairing of parents to produce offspring to evaluate trait inheritance.

entities.name: RECIPROCAL CROSS
entities.description: A cross where the parents are swapped to test for maternal or cytoplasmic effects.

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: One of the two contrasting environmental conditions used for evaluating the traits.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: One of the two contrasting environmental conditions used for evaluating the traits.

entities.name: NUCLEAR DETERMINANTS
entities.description: Genetic factors located within the cell nucleus that control trait inheritance.

entities.name: SEED BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A program focused on developing high-quality seeds for production.

entities.name: RESTORER PARENT BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A program focused on developing parents that restore fertility in hybrid offspring.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through genetic improvement.
